Headline: No trains between Kimball and Belmont
ShortDescription: Loop- Bound Brown Line service has been temporarily suspended between Kimball and Belmont due to a loss of power.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Loop- Bound Brown Line service has been temporarily suspended between Kimball and Belmont due to a loss of power.

As a result, trains are operating only between Belmont and Clark/Lake at this time.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#81 Lawrence

#82 Kimball-Homan

Shuttle buses are available from Kimball to Belmont provide connecting service through the affected area.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #55 Garfield Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Garfield/Wentworth
ShortDescription: Eastbound 55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via 55th, Wells, 59th, Sate and 55th: due to, street blockage near Garfield/Wentworth.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via 55th, Wells, 59th, Sate and 55th: due to, street blockage near Garfield/Wentworth.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
